backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a threat hunting report storage system with CRUD operations for reports containing metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including report form interface, MITRE ATT&CK integration, PDF generation, report listing, and security-focused UI theme.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, pages, utilities, and configuration for the threat hunting report application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color palettes using OKLCH color space for a security-focused aesthetic.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Report Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for report listing, creation, and detail views, wrapped in theme provider and layout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout component with sticky header navigation, conditional hero banner on homepage, and footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable popover component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with badge display, filtering by ID/name/description, and add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for threat hunting reports with loading state and error handling via toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: React form component for creating threat hunting reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings. Manages dynamic lists with add/remove functionality and validates required fields before submission.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing an array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques with IDs, names, and descriptions covering tactics like Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the ICP backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for CRUD operations on threat hunting reports, including fetching all reports, fetching individual reports, saving new reports, and deleting reports with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a design system for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component for creating new threat hunting reports, rendering a ReportForm within a Card layout and handling form submission by calling the backend save mutation and navigating back to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single threat hunting report with executive summary, threat actors, MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and findings. Includes navigation back to list and PDF download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: Lists all threat hunting reports in a table with metadata (title, author, date, technique count, IOC count) and provides actions to view details, download PDF, or delete reports.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates printable HTML reports by opening a new window with styled content including report metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings for browser-based printing to PDF.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for typography, shadows, animations, and design tokens for a security-focused UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking completed features (report creation, MITRE ATT&CK integration, PDF generation, report listing) and pending backend storage implementation for the threat hunting report portal.
